Restrictions on Assistance for New Independent States of Former Soviet Union; Report to Congress, , , which related to restrictions on availability of funds to new independent states of the former Soviet Union and Secretary of State’s annual report, was repealed by , , .Pub. L. 103–87, title V, § 560(g)107 Stat. 967Pub. L. 112–74, div. I, title VII, § 7034(n)125 Stat. 1217Sept. 30, 1993Dec. 23, 2011Similar provisions relating to nonavailability of funds to any government of the new independent states of the former Soviet Union if that government directs any action in violation of the territorial integrity or national sovereignty of any other new independent state, were contained in the Foreign Operations, Export Financing, and Related Programs Appropriations Act, 2006, , , , and were repeated in provisions of subsequent appropriations acts which are not set out in the Code.
